projectDescription: A lightweight React Native library that provides declarative, native-powered animations via a single EaseView component, using Core Animation on iOS and ObjectAnimator/SpringAnimation on Android with zero JS overhead.
keyFeatures: Zero JS thread overhead — animations run entirely on native platform APIs (Core Animation on iOS, ObjectAnimator/SpringAnimation on Android)
Declarative CSS-transition-like API with a single EaseView component
Timing animations with preset and custom cubic bezier easing curves
Physics-based spring animations with damping, stiffness, and mass control
Per-property transition maps for mixed animation configs on a single view
Enter animations via initialAnimate prop for mount-time transitions
Looping animations with repeat and reverse modes
Smooth animation interruption — redirects mid-animation without jumps
Configurable transform origin for scale and rotation pivot control
Android hardware layer support for GPU texture compositing
Fabric (new architecture) only — no old architecture support
